name: BioChemAI
description: BioChemAI is an AI-powered biochemistry teaching aid from Techbridge University College. It answers biochemistry questions around the clock across five learning levels, from primary school to professional practice, and can generate quizzes, structured documents, and voice-led explanations.
features: Conversational biochemistry tutoring at five learning levels (primary, secondary, undergraduate, postgraduate, professional)
Auto-generated biochemistry quizzes with adjustable question counts
Answers exported to PDF and structured formats (Markdown, HTML documentation, LaTeX)
Five visual themes for comfortable reading
audience: Students and educators in biochemistry, from primary school through to professional practice

faqs.a: BioChemAI is an AI-powered biochemistry teaching aid built by Techbridge University College. It answers biochemistry questions 24/7 and adapts its explanations to the learner's level, from primary school to professional practice.
It is designed for students and educators studying or teaching biochemistry at primary, secondary, undergraduate, postgraduate, and professional levels.
It explains biochemistry concepts conversationally, generates practice quizzes, produces documentation in Markdown, HTML, and LaTeX, and accepts spoken questions through voice input.

faqs.q: How do I start using BioChemAI?
faqs.a: Open the app and sign in with a Techbridge University College account or with Google, then choose your learning level and ask your first biochemistry question.
BioChemAI was built by the ICT department of Techbridge University College in Accra, Ghana.
